title: cenolophium denudatum
intro: Cenolophium denudatum, also known as barestem centaury, is a flowering plant species in the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and providing antioxidant properties. Cenolophium denudatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal treatment.
